name: JM Search
why: Managing Partner Andrew Henry leads Healthcare & Life Sciences practice. 20+ years PE-backed healthcare tech COO placements. Direct match on vertical SaaS + health tech background.
notes: Also: Pam Zients (Partner, digital health COO specialist) and Kristy Lindquist (Practice Leader, digital health). Consider following up with them if Andrew doesn't respond.

name: Storm3
why: US Commercial lead Perrin Joel heads NY office. Pure health tech specialist. Directly relevant given ChartRequest background.
notes: Health tech only. Finance & Operations practice explicitly places COOs. Based in NYC World Trade Center.

name: Daversa Partners
why: Will Sheridan is Director in Orlando office focusing on CEO/President/COO at growth-stage and VC-backed SaaS. Direct function match.
notes: Top-tier VC/growth-stage tech firm. Forbes #145 Best Executive Recruiting 2025. Email format: first@daversa.com

name: StevenDouglas
why: Drew Zachmann leads Operations & COO search nationally from Atlanta. PE-backed portfolio COO placements. Local market advantage.

contacts.name: Drew Zachmann
contacts.title: Director, Operations & Supply Chain Executive Search

notes: Atlanta office. C-suite COO/CMO/CHRO/VP Ops search. PE-backed portfolio focus. Also: Matthew Beck leads national Sales/Marketing/Ops practice.

name: Acertitude
why: Rick DeRose leads Technology & Healthcare practices. PE portfolio C-suite specialist. 200+ placements for Platinum Equity alone. Strong COO/ops track record.
notes: Forbes #139. Inc 500 3 consecutive years. PE Power 75 firm. Also: Kevin O'Neill (co-founder, COO placements in consumer/industrial). Email format: FLast@acertitude.com

name: ON Partners
why: Seth Harris is the SaaS practice partner. 20+ years placing C-level at VC-backed and PE-backed SaaS. Forbes #34 recruiting firm. Explicit SaaS COO work.
notes: Pure-play retained search, Forbes #34. Partner-led model from day one. 85% client return rate. 95% new business from referrals. Also: Bryan Buck (Managing Partner) and Brad Westveld (Partner). Email format: FLast@onpartners.com

name: CarterBaldwin Executive Search
why: Atlanta HQ. Jennifer Sobocinski leads Technology practice. PE-backed company C-suite placements including COO. Strong local relationship advantage.
notes: Atlanta HQ (Roswell, GA). Hunt Scanlon Top 50 and PE Power 75. Inc 500 twice. Also: Dave Sobocinski (Founding Partner, PE/mid-market C-suite). Email format: FLast@carterbaldwin.com

name: Crist|Kolder Associates
why: Scott Simmons is Co-Managing Partner leading COO and operating officer searches. Explicit COO practice. PE portfolio work. Annual COO Volatility Report signals deep functional expertise.
notes: Downers Grove IL. CEO/CFO/COO/Board specialist only. No off-limits issues (limited search volume). Clem Johnson (President) also relevant. Email format: FLast@cristkolder.com

name: Slayton Search Partners
why: Rick Slayton leads COO/CFO C-suite placement firm. Forbes #38. PE-backed portfolio focus. Explicit COO practice.
notes: Chicago-based. Acquired by The Judge Group 2022 but operates independently. CFO/CIO/COO/CHRO/CMO/CSO/CTO specialist. Forbes #38. Email format: FLast@slaytonsearch.com

name: Nexus Search Partners
why: Thadd Jones founded firm from Amazon/Fortune 500 C-suite background. Charlotte-based. PE-backed COO/President placements. Diversity-forward retained search.
notes: Charlotte NC. Founded 2023, fast-growing. Amazon AWS / Red Ventures background. Contact also at info@nexussearchpartners.com. Worth warm intro given shared civic/community engagement background.

name: Riviera Partners
why: Ryan Brogan joined PE practice Sept 2025. PE portfolio COO and tech leadership placements. Primarily tech/engineering but PE practice does operating leader work.
notes: Primarily CTO/CPO/VP Eng. PE practice under Brogan does COO-adjacent work. Worth a shot but lower probability than Tier 1. Email format: FLast@rivierapartners.com
